manifest.author: duocnv
manifest.description: Embed any website to Obsidian, you have anything you need in one place. You can browse website and take notes at the same time. e.g. Ask ChatGPT and copy the answer directly to your note.
manifest.name: Open Gate

name: Open Gate

releases.author: nguyenvanduocit
releases.description:
## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### Improved Bot Detection Bypass
- **Add default Chrome user agent**: Webview now uses a real Chrome user agent by default
  - Electron's default user agent contains "Electron" which triggers bot detection
  - Now defaults to `Chrome/131.0.0.0` user agent when none is specified
  - Users can still override with custom user agent in gate settings

This is a follow-up to v1.11.12 for better Cloudflare compatibility.

## 📦 Installation

Update through Obsidian Community Plugins or download manually.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nguyenvanduocit/obsidian-open-gate/compare/1.11.12...1.11.13
releases.name: v1.11.13: Add default Chrome user agent

releases.author: nguyenvanduocit
releases.description:
## 🐛 Bug Fixes

### Cloudflare Verification Fix
- **Fix "Verifying you are human" never completing**: Removed webview attributes that triggered bot detection
  - Removed `disablewebsecurity` attribute that was flagging the browser as automated
  - Removed invalid `crossorigin` attribute (not supported by Electron webview)
  - Webview now behaves like a standard browser, passing Cloudflare and other anti-bot checks

Fixes #87

## 📦 Installation

Update through Obsidian Community Plugins or download manually.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nguyenvanduocit/obsidian-open-gate/compare/1.11.11...1.11.12
releases.name: v1.11.12: Fix Cloudflare human verification detection

releases.description:
In this version, we support custom css for the codeblock syntax. you can use multipleline

## What's Changed
* Add support for custom css in inline gates (#26) by @andrewmcgivery in https://github.com/nguyenvanduocit/obsidian-open-gate/pull/36

## New Contributors
* @andrewmcgivery made their first contribution in https://github.com/nguyenvanduocit/obsidian-open-gate/pull/36

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nguyenvanduocit/obsidian-open-gate/compare/1.9.4...1.9.5
